info.title: WebMole AEO Audit API
info.description:
Run AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) audits programmatically. Score any public URL for AI citation readiness on a 0–100 scale. Returns per-factor analysis across 12 signals and prioritized fix suggestions with copy-paste code blocks.

Use this API when you need to:
- Check if a URL is optimized for ChatGPT, Perplexity, Gemini, or Google AI Overviews
- Get AEO scores for CI/CD pipelines or monitoring dashboards
- Retrieve structured fix suggestions (JSON-LD, meta tags, robots.txt) for a page
- Audit competitor URLs for benchmarking

Authentication: Bearer token (keys start with `wbm_`). Generate a key at https://webmole.ai/dashboard/settings.

Rate limits: Starter 100/day, Pro 500/day, Agency 2,000/day. All limits reset at midnight UTC.

post.summary: Run an AEO audit on a URL
post.description:
Fetches the target URL, runs 12 AEO/GEO factor checks, and returns a 0–100 score, per-factor analysis, category scores, and prioritized fix suggestions with copy-paste code blocks.

Use this operation when a user asks to:
- Check AI citation readiness for a page
- Get their AEO or GEO score
- Find out why a site isn't appearing in ChatGPT, Perplexity, or Gemini
- Get fix suggestions (JSON-LD, meta tags, robots.txt updates) for a page
- Audit a competitor URL

The audit completes in under 10 seconds for most pages. Private URLs, localhost addresses, and internal IP ranges are rejected.

200.description: Audit completed successfully. Returns score, 12-factor analysis, and fix suggestions.

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Daily request limit for your plan

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the rate limit resets (midnight UTC)

factors.name: Header Hierarchy
factors.details: H1→H2→H3 structure found, one skipped level detected

fixSuggestions.instruction: Add a concise meta description (120-160 chars) summarising the page for AI systems and search engines.
fixSuggestions.codeBlock: <meta name="description" content="Your page summary here — keep it to 120-160 characters." />

400.description: Bad request — invalid URL, malformed body, fetch failure, or fetch timeout.

error.message: "url" must be a valid URL (e.g., https://example.com).
Request body must be valid JSON.
URL fetch timed out after 10 seconds.

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key.

429.description: Rate limited — daily request limit reached. Check the Retry-After header for the number of seconds until reset.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the rate limit resets

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Daily request limit for your plan

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the limit resets

error.message: Daily limit of 100 requests reached. Resets at 2026-03-18T00:00:00.000Z.

500.description: Internal server error — scoring failed. Retry once; contact support if the issue persists.

error.message: Failed to analyze the page. Please try again.

bearerAuth.description: API key from WebMole dashboard. Keys start with `wbm_`. Generate at https://webmole.ai/dashboard/settings. Include in every request as: `Authorization: Bearer wbm_your_key`.

url.description: Fully qualified URL to audit. Must start with https://. Max 2048 characters. Private/internal IPs, localhost, and non-public addresses are rejected.

score.description: Overall AEO score from 0 to 100. Below 60 typically means the page is being passed over by AI citation systems. Above 80 indicates strong AI citability.

factors.description: Results for each of the 12 AEO factors. Each factor returns a score, maximum, status, and details string.

fixSuggestions.description: Prioritized fix suggestions for failing or warning factors. Only includes factors that need attention. Each fix includes an instruction and, where applicable, a codeBlock to paste directly into the site.

spaWarning.description: Present and true if the page appears to be a client-side rendered SPA (React, Next.js client-only, Vue, etc.) with little server-rendered HTML. Results may be incomplete for SPAs. Ensure server-side rendering or static HTML for accurate scores.

scannedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the audit was performed.

CategoryScores.description: AEO score broken down into four categories. Each is a normalized 0–100 score representing that category's contribution.

answerReadiness.description: How well the content is structured for AI systems to extract direct answers. Measures: answer capsules, FAQ sections, content front-loading, readability.

structure.description: Semantic HTML structure quality. Measures: header hierarchy, section lengths, lists and tables.

authoritySignals.description: Credibility signals that AI citation systems use to assess trustworthiness. Measures: statistics density, source citations.

technicalGEO.description: Technical crawlability and machine-readable metadata. Measures: schema markup (JSON-LD), meta tags, AI bot access in robots.txt.

FactorResult.description: Result for a single AEO factor. The 12 factors cover header hierarchy, answer capsules, section lengths, FAQ sections, statistics density, source citations, schema markup, meta tags, content front-loading, AI bot access, readability, and lists/tables.

max.description: Maximum possible points for this factor. The 12 factors sum to 100.

status.description: pass = factor is well-optimized. fail = factor is missing or broken. warn = factor is partially implemented.

details.description: Human-readable explanation of the finding for this factor.

FixSuggestion.description: A prioritized fix for a failing or warning AEO factor. The instruction explains what to do; codeBlock (when present) contains the exact code to paste into the site.

factorId.description: ID of the failing factor this fix addresses.

factorName.description: Human-readable name of the failing factor.

impact.description: Estimated impact on AEO score if this fix is applied. High impact fixes should be addressed first.

instruction.description: Plain-language explanation of what to fix and how.

codeBlock.description: Ready-to-paste code snippet (JSON-LD schema markup, HTML meta tags, robots.txt directives, etc.). Present for most technical fixes; absent for content-only recommendations.

RateLimitInfo.description: Current rate limit status for your API key. Check remaining before making batch requests.

remaining.description: Number of requests remaining today (UTC day).

limit.description: Total daily request limit for your plan. Starter: 100. Pro: 500. Agency: 2000.

resetAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the daily limit resets. Always midnight UTC.

message.description: Human-readable error message explaining the failure and how to fix it.

tags.name: Audit
tags.description: AEO audit operations. Run an audit to get a 0–100 AI citation readiness score, 12-factor analysis, and fix suggestions for any public URL.
